summary: FXIFY scored 83/100 with flexible account options across MT4, MT5, and DXTrade. You can choose from instant funding, lightning challenge, or one, two, and three step evaluation processes, with raw spreads from 0 pips or commission-free trading. While the prop firm partners with forex broker FXPIG and offers great flexibility in its account options, the lack of transparency around actual trading costs and the minimal educational resources available might be off-putting to some.
bestFor: Traders who want flexibility in evaluation types and the option to choose between raw spreads or commission-free trading
notIdealFor: Traders who prioritise detailed cost information and comprehensive educational resources

categorySections.challenges:
FXIFY offers five challenge types — **Instant Funding**, **Lightning**, **One Phase**, **Two Phase**, and **Three Phase** — with account sizes from $1K to $400K and fees starting at $39.

Instant Funding provides immediate access with no evaluation, an 8% trailing drawdown, and up to 90% profit split. Lightning is a 7-day evaluation with a 5% profit target, 3% daily loss, and 4% trailing drawdown. One Phase requires 10% profit with 3% daily loss and 6% trailing drawdown. Two Phase targets 10% then 5% with 4% daily loss and 10% trailing drawdown. Three Phase requires 5% per phase with 5% daily loss and 10% static drawdown.

Optional add-ons include higher profit split (+20% fee), bi-weekly payouts (+5%), performance protect (+15%), and increased leverage to 50:1 (+25%). The scaling plan allows 25% account growth every 3 months for a 10% return, with accounts scaling up to $4M. FXIFY scored 9/10 for challenges.
categorySections.spreads:
FXIFY offers two pricing models: **raw spreads from 0 pips** with a $6 round-turn commission per lot, or **commission-free all-inclusive** spreads. The raw spread model uses FXPIG's data feed for institutional-grade liquidity.

During testing, spreads on popular pairs like EUR/USD started as low as 0 pips during London and New York sessions, though they tend to widen during off-hours. One drawback is that FXIFY doesn't publish average spread data, so traders should use demo accounts to assess pricing.

No swap-free accounts are currently available, though FXIFY has indicated this may be added in the future. FXIFY scored 8/10 for spreads.
categorySections.markets:
FXIFY provides access to **101 instruments on MT5**, **71 on MT4**, and **62 on DXTrade** across forex, indices, commodities, stocks, and crypto.

Forex includes 42 major, minor, and exotic pairs. Indices cover 13 global markets including S&P 500, DAX, and ASX. Commodities include crude oil (WTI/Brent), gold, and silver. Stocks (30 instruments) are exclusive to MT5, featuring Apple, Amazon, and Tesla. Crypto (7 instruments) is available on MT4 and MT5 only.

Default leverage is **30:1** for forex and gold, **10:1** for indices, and **2:1** for stocks and crypto. An add-on increases forex/gold leverage to **50:1** for an additional 25% of the challenge fee. FXIFY scored 7/10 for markets.
categorySections.platforms:
FXIFY offers three platforms — **MT4**, **MT5**, and **DXTrade with TradingView integration**. Platform availability varies by challenge type: MT4 is available for One Phase, Two Phase, and Three Phase only. MT5 is available for all account types. DXTrade is available for all except Lightning.

MT4 provides advanced charting, EA support, and one-click trading. MT5 adds more timeframes, Depth of Market, an economic calendar, and stock/crypto access. DXTrade with TradingView offers 100+ indicators, customizable layouts, and cloud-based access.

EAs are supported on MT4 and MT5 only (not DXTrade or Lightning accounts). FXIFY scored 8/10 for platforms.
categorySections.payouts:
Profit splits start at **80%** and can be increased to **90%** with the profit split add-on. Challenge fees are **refunded with the first profitable payout**.

The first withdrawal is available **on demand** after the first profitable live trade (Instant Funding accounts after 14 days). Subsequent withdrawals are monthly by default, or bi-weekly with the add-on. Processing takes **24-48 hours** with no minimum withdrawal amount (except $50 for Instant Funding).

Withdrawal methods include bank transfers, cryptocurrency, and Deel. Accounts enter read-only mode during withdrawal processing. FXIFY regularly shares verified payout proofs across Discord and social media. FXIFY scored 9/10 for payouts.
categorySections.support:
FXIFY offers **live chat** and **email support**, accessible 24/7 during weekdays. Response times and quality have received mixed reviews, with some users reporting delays when transitioning from automated chatbot to human support.

Educational resources are limited compared to other prop firms. YouTube content is minimal and lacks comprehensive tutorials. The Support Hub and FAQ section cover common questions, but traders seeking in-depth educational materials may need to look elsewhere. FXIFY scored a combined rating reflecting accessible but basic support.
categorySections.trust:
FXIFY holds a **4.4/5 Trustpilot rating** from over **4,900 reviews**, with positive feedback regarding fast payouts and user-friendly trading rules.

The prop firm maintains an active **Discord server** with verified trader channels, payout proof sharing, and community discussions. FXIFY is also active on Instagram, Facebook, and Twitter.

FXIFY is backed by **FXPIG**, a broker licensed by the **Vanuatu Financial Services Commission (VFSC)** under License Number 014578. While Vanuatu regulation isn't as strict as ASIC or FCA, it provides more oversight than prop firms with no broker transparency. FXIFY scored 9/10 for trust.

verdictBlocks.heading: Final Verdict on FXIFY
verdictBlocks.body:
FXIFY offers a range of evaluation options and customisable features, which can be appealing for traders who value flexibility. However, the added costs for upgrades, such as bi-weekly payouts and increased leverage, may not suit those looking for a more straightforward or affordable funding model.

The lack of transparency around spreads and available markets could be a drawback for traders who prioritise detailed cost information and market variety. While FXIFY has a solid community presence and offers scaling options, some users may find that the limited data on trading costs makes it harder to assess the true value of the proprietary trading firm.

faq.q: Where can I find the best FXIFY deals?
faq.a: You can find the best FXIFY deals on BestPropFirms.com, where we offer exclusive promo codes like PROPFIRMS15 for 15% off all FXIFY challenges.

Yes, FXIFY has a separate futures prop trading firm, FXIFY Futures. This program offers funded futures accounts up to $150K, with a one-step evaluation, TradingView-based charts, and real-time CME data. Unlike FXIFY's CFD-focused challenges, FXIFY Futures is tailored for traders looking to trade futures with transparent pricing and no time limits.

faq.q: Is FXIFY prop trading firm a scam?
faq.a: FXIFY is not considered a scam; it is a registered prop trading firm that offers funded accounts and has numerous verified reviews on platforms like TrustPilot, where it holds a score of 4.4 out of 5. However, some users have reported delays in account activation and withdrawals, particularly on higher-tier accounts.

FXIFY appears safe, providing standard security measures and a community-backed reputation. It has established a presence across social media and TrustPilot, with a majority of positive reviews, especially about their payout processes. FXIFY is backed by FXPIG, a broker licensed by the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission (VFSC).

FXIFY operates through FXPIG, a broker known for supporting prop firms with competitive spreads and fast execution. FXPIG provides trading platforms like MT4, MT5, and DXTrade, giving FXIFY traders access to multiple trading environments.

faq.q: What is the profit split on FXIFY?
faq.a: FXIFY's profit split starts at 80%, allowing traders to keep the majority of their profits. This can be increased to 90% by purchasing a profit-split add-on during account setup. The profit split applies to all funded accounts after passing the evaluation phase.
